a:r.a:t: Features and highlights of the Use case
Leverages a machine learning engine to forecast the likelihood of on-time payments for open invoices, allowing the finance team to anticipate cash flow and identify risks before they escalate.

Automatically generates a dynamic, risk-scored list of customers and invoices. This directs the collections team to focus their efforts on the highest-impact accounts, maximizing efficiency and reducing DSO.
A multi-page SAP Analytics Cloud story provides a single source of truth for AR. It visualizes key metrics like DSO trends, overdue movement, and on-time payment rates in an interactive console.

Enables users to navigate seamlessly from high-level summary KPIs down to the individual customer and invoice level. Features a world map visualization to analyze and compare payment performance across different regions.

Empowers business users to get instant answers with natural language queries ("Just Ask"). The system also automatically uncovers the key drivers behind KPI changes with "Smart Insights," reducing manual analysis time.
